execute(Actor, GameMap) - Method in class edu.monash.fit2099.engine.items.DropAction
When an item is dropped, remove the item from the actor's inventory and add it to the current location of the actor.
execute(Actor, GameMap) - Method in class edu.monash.fit2099.engine.items.PickUpAction
When an item is picked up, remove the item from the ground and add it to the actor's inventory.
